item.create_rockets.raptor_3.tooltip.sum: A two-block rocket engine for Simulated contraptions and Aeronautics ships. Fuel it through the thruster menu, then provide a redstone signal to control the throttle.
item.create_rockets.raptor_3.tooltip.act: Open the fuel menu and insert burnable fuel.
Needs two clear blocks and points its exhaust away from the nozzle base.
Ignites entities and damages blocks in front of the nozzle, so keep the plume clear.
A two-block rocket engine for Simulated contraptions and Aeronautics ships. Fuel it through the thruster menu, then provide a redstone signal to control the throttle.

Ignites entities and damages blocks in front of the nozzle, so keep the plume clear.
create_rockets.ponder.thruster.text_1: Thrusters require fuel and redstone to operate
